case_title: ESPERANZA ESTRADA et al VS. JORGE ANTICONA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-10-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANTICONA, JORGE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HELBRAUN FILED BY ESTRADA, ESPERANZA ESTRADA, EZEQUIEL ANTICONA, JORGE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ESTRADA, ESPERANZA ESTRADA, EZEQUIEL AS TO DEFENDANT ANTICONA, JORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HELBRAUN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, WHO WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PAIGE KUMM INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, ESPERANZA ESTRADA, EZEQUIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTICONA, JORGE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
